recommendations.title: Brexit: The Uncivil War
recommendations.overview: Political strategist Dominic Cummings leads a popular but controversial campaign to convince British voters to leave the European Union from 2015 up until the present day.

recommendations.title: Made in Britain
recommendations.overview: After being sent to a detention centre, a teenage skinhead clashes with the social workers who want to conform him to the status quo.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: The Rutles: All You Need Is Cash
recommendations.overview: The story of the rise and fall of the Pre-Fab Four.

recommendations.title: Homeless to Harvard: The Liz Murray Story
recommendations.overview: Based on a true story. Liz Murray is a young girl who is taken care of by her loving, but drug-addicted parents. Liz becomes homeless at 15 and after a tragedy comes upon her, she begins her work to finish high school.

recommendations.title: The Pregnancy Pact
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the true story of teenagers at Gloucester High School who agreed to get pregnant at the same time.

recommendations.title: Return to Zero
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of a successful couple, Maggie and Aaron who are preparing for the arrival of their first child.

recommendations.title: Too Young to Die
recommendations.overview: An abused 15 year old is charged with a murder that carries the death penalty in this fact-based story.

recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: A former American G.I. joins a yakuza family after his release from prison in post-World War II Osaka.

recommendations.title: Swing Vote
recommendations.overview: In a remarkable turn of events, the result of the presidential election comes down to one man's vote.
